CheckTitle: Ensure no guest users hold privileged directory roles
Description: Detects guest (external) users who hold privileged directory roles such as Global Administrator, Security Administrator, or other high-privilege roles.
Risk: Guest accounts are managed outside your tenant and may not follow your security policies. A compromised external account with admin privileges gives an attacker full control over your directory.

Remediation.Recommendation: Remove all guest users from privileged directory roles. If external admin access is needed, use dedicated cloud-only accounts within your tenant.

SourceNotes: AI-generated framework mappings — verify before citing in compliance reports.
